## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `cobuild` with `--provider ...`
2. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or log output if available.

Log files are written to `~/.cobuild/logs/cobuild-YYYY-MM-DD.log`.

## Environment

- cobuild version:
- Node.js version (`node --version`):
- OS and version:

- Provider version (e.g. `ollama --version` or `codex --version`):
